headline: NANO Nuclear Slides 10%, Oklo Falls 8%, Cameco Slips 4% After Nuclear Stocks Explosive Rally

headline: SMCZ Faces Unlimited Loss Risk as SMCI Reports Earnings Today After Close
summary: The Defiance Daily Target 2X Short SMCI ETF (NASDAQ:SMCZ) exists for one job: deliver negative two times the daily price move of Super Micro Computer. Traders use it to press a short-term bearish view on a single AI-server name without borrowing shares or paying short-rebate fees. It is a tactical instrument, sized for hours and ... headline: Super Micro Computer Explores Nuclear Powered AI Data Centers And Valuation Risk
summary: Super Micro Computer (NasdaqGS:SMCI) has entered a partnership with Nano Nuclear Energy to explore using advanced nuclear microreactors to power its AI servers and data centers. The collaboration aims to support self-powered, grid-independent AI infrastructure for future data center deployments. The focus is on addressing power constraints tied to large scale AI and data processing, an issue drawing increasing attention across the server and data center market.
